project.name: Kreya
project.tagline: Tell Kreya what you need. Consider it done.
project.description: AI-powered, WhatsApp-first social media management SaaS. Users send WhatsApp messages (text, photo, video, voice note) → Claude generates caption + image → publishes to Instagram.
project.core_loop: WhatsApp input (text / photo / video / voice) → Claude caption → AI or user image → Instagram post

hosting.auto_deploy: GitHub push to main → Vercel auto-deploys
hosting.note: Old 'kreya' project (kreya-jet.vercel.app) is deprecated — do not use

storage.purpose: Host user-uploaded photos/videos for WhatsApp→Instagram flow

database_schema.pending_posts: id, whatsapp_phone, caption, image_url, user_image_url, image_source (user|ai), is_video, sibling_id, state (pending_approval|in_edit|scheduled|published|discarded), scheduled_for, ig_post_id, ig_post_url, created_at
database_schema.instagram_accounts: id, account_name, instagram_user_id, access_token, token_expires_at, is_active
database_schema.user_profiles: id, whatsapp_phone, brand_name, niche, tone, profile_context, onboarding_step (1-4), created_at

whatsapp_flow.onboarding: 3-question brand setup (name → niche → tone) stored in user_profiles, gates all messages until step=4

edit_flow.text_in_edit: handleEditRefinement — caption update, image regeneration, or revert to user photo
edit_flow.media_in_edit: handleEditWithNewMedia — replaces image/video, keeps existing caption

whatsapp_flow.voice: Groq Whisper transcription → used as prompt for caption + AI image generation
whatsapp_flow.scheduling: Natural language parsed by Claude Haiku → stored as scheduled_for TIMESTAMPTZ

known_limitations.scheduling: publish-scheduled cron removed (Vercel Hobby plan — every-5min not allowed). Scheduled posts won't auto-publish until Pro plan or alternative cron.
known_limitations.instagram_multi_user: instagram-publish.ts hardcoded to 'nepostnuto' account — not multi-user yet
known_limitations.music_collaborators: Not available via Instagram Graph API — app-only features

completed_this_session: Fixed Vercel deployment (was stuck on old commit — cron job caused build failures)
Consolidated to single Vercel project: kreya-github.vercel.app
Fixed photo upload — user's actual photo now shown in preview (not AI-generated)
Fixed edit flow — sending photo during edit keeps caption, only swaps image
Fixed video/GIF previews — text header used instead of broken image header
Fixed edit refinement — isVideo passed to sendPostPreview in all paths
Context-aware edit prompts and live messages (video vs image)
Better caption fallback when no description given (prevents copying recent post themes)
Voice note support via Groq Whisper — send voice → get Instagram post
next_session_ideas: Multi-user Instagram support (map whatsapp_phone to instagram account)
Caption variants (show 3 options, user picks one)
Profile update via WhatsApp ('update my tone to...')
Scheduled post publishing workaround (external cron or Supabase pg_cron)
